entries.name: Fintech — Neobank
entries.tone_guidance: Specific, calm, never celebratory of debt — use exact amounts in lists and never abstract them into ranges.

entries.name: Fintech — Consumer Lending
characteristics: decision moment is the entire UX
entries.tone_guidance: State the APR before the headline number — never bury the cost behind a celebratory monthly payment.

entries.name: Fintech — Insurance (Insurtech)
entries.tone_guidance: Explain coverage in plain numbers and named scenarios — never use insurance jargon as a verb.

entries.name: Fintech — Crypto / Web3 Exchange
entries.tone_guidance: Show risk warnings at the same weight as the buy button — never make leverage look like a feature.

entries.name: Fintech — Payments Infrastructure
entries.tone_guidance: Docs ARE the marketing — show real code with real values, never lorem-style placeholders.

entries.name: Fintech — Corporate Treasury
entries.tone_guidance: Surface the variance and the source — never round a treasury number for the sake of a clean card.

entries.name: Fintech — Accounting / Bookkeeping SaaS
entries.tone_guidance: Use the bookkeeper's vocabulary, not 'finance simplified' — your power user is the accountant.

entries.name: Fintech — Billing / Subscription Platform
entries.tone_guidance: Always show the math of a proration — your users are debugging invoices, not vibing on the brand.

entries.name: Fintech — Fundraising / Cap Table Platform
entries.tone_guidance: Never gamify dilution — equity is one-way, the UI should treat it that way.

entries.name: Fintech — Brokerage / Retail Trading
entries.tone_guidance: Never confetti a trade — the same UI that celebrates a win will haunt a loss.

entries.name: Fintech — Wealth Management / Robo-Advisor
entries.tone_guidance: Show real annualized returns net of fees — never advertise pre-fee performance as the headline.

entries.name: Healthcare — Telehealth
entries.tone_guidance: Confirm the doctor's name and the visit time on every screen — anxiety multiplies any ambiguity.

entries.name: Healthcare — Patient Portal
entries.tone_guidance: Plain words for clinical results — never display a lab value without a plain-language interpretation.

entries.name: Healthcare — EHR / Clinician Workflow
entries.tone_guidance: Never animate a critical alert — motion at the wrong moment is a clinical error vector.

entries.name: Healthcare — Mental Health App
entries.tone_guidance: Crisis resources must be one tap from every screen — never bury 988/Samaritans behind a menu.

entries.name: Healthcare — Clinical Research / Trials
entries.tone_guidance: eConsent is a legal document, not a marketing page — never use celebratory copy in the consent flow.

entries.name: Healthcare — Pharma Marketing / HCP Portal
entries.tone_guidance: ISI weight equals headline weight — never let efficacy claims float without contraindications nearby.

entries.name: Healthcare — Medical Devices
entries.tone_guidance: Treat error states like aviation cockpit — one error, one cause, one action, no marketing softening.

entries.name: Healthcare — Nutrition / Diet Tracking
entries.tone_guidance: Never moralize food — no 'cheat day' language, no red-for-bad-foods. Show numbers, let the user decide.

entries.name: Healthcare — Women's Health
entries.tone_guidance: Treat cycle data like medical records — privacy controls in the primary nav, never buried in settings.

entries.name: Healthcare — Sleep / Recovery
characteristics: trend over time more than nightly score
entries.tone_guidance: Never red-light a low sleep score — anxiety about sleep destroys sleep. Use neutral framing.

entries.name: E-commerce — Luxury Fashion
entries.tone_guidance: Don't announce discounts on the homepage — luxury never SHOUTS savings.

entries.name: E-commerce — Fast Fashion
entries.tone_guidance: Show inventory count when low — urgency is honest only when the stock number is real.

entries.name: E-commerce — Beauty / Cosmetics
entries.tone_guidance: Show the full ingredient list above the product hero — beauty buyers read backwards from INCI now.

entries.name: E-commerce — Multi-Vendor Marketplace
entries.tone_guidance: Always show the seller, not just the SKU — marketplace trust collapses when sellers feel like a backdrop.

entries.name: E-commerce — Dropshipping Storefront
entries.tone_guidance: Disclose actual shipping time at the buy button — burying it kills LTV and invites chargebacks.

entries.name: E-commerce — Food Delivery
entries.tone_guidance: ETA must be the most prominent element after delivery starts — never let promo banners cover the map.

entries.name: E-commerce — Online Grocery
entries.tone_guidance: Show price-per-unit at the SKU — never hide weight-based math one tap deep.

entries.name: E-commerce — Used Vehicle Marketplace
entries.tone_guidance: Show the accident/title history at the top of the PDP — burying it is a trust killer for the whole category.

entries.name: E-commerce — C2C Marketplace
entries.tone_guidance: Surface scam warnings before contact, not after — the moment of first message is when fraud happens.

entries.name: E-commerce — Eyewear
compliance_notes: FDA medical device for Rx lenses

entries.name: SaaS — Productivity
entries.tone_guidance: Show the shortcut next to the menu item — productivity tools are judged by how fast power users move.

entries.name: SaaS — Monitoring / Observability
entries.tone_guidance: Red status means down — never use red as a brand color anywhere else in the product.

entries.name: SaaS — AI Research / Search
entries.tone_guidance: Cite every claim with a visible source — uncited generated answers destroy trust for the whole category.

entries.name: Consumer — Social Network
entries.tone_guidance: Never auto-play sound — phones in pockets at meetings is the universal experience.

entries.name: Consumer — Dating App
entries.tone_guidance: Safety reporting must be one tap from any profile — never make abuse-report harder than 'send a wink.'

entries.name: Consumer — Meditation App
entries.tone_guidance: Streak break shouldn't shame — a missed day is a meditation lesson, not a failure UI.

entries.name: Consumer — Ride Sharing
entries.tone_guidance: Show the full fare estimate before request — surge that surprises is a category-killing pattern.

entries.name: Consumer — Travel Booking
entries.tone_guidance: Show total price with taxes/fees up front — never reveal a $200 increase at the payment step.

entries.name: Enterprise — ERP
entries.tone_guidance: Inline every field validation — when a CFO is closing books at 11pm, 'form contains errors' is unacceptable.

entries.name: Enterprise — Security / SOC
entries.tone_guidance: Color-code only by severity — never use red for any non-incident UI in the product.

entries.name: Government — Tax Filing
entries.tone_guidance: Explain why a question is asked before asking it — fear of audit makes ambiguity expensive.

entries.name: Government — Voting Information
entries.tone_guidance: Show ID requirements before the polling location — voters turned away at the booth is the real failure mode.

entries.name: Media — Video Streaming
entries.tone_guidance: Never autoplay video with sound on entry — household contexts make sound a privacy violation.

entries.name: Media — Ticketing / Events
entries.tone_guidance: Show all fees before the credit card step — surprise fees at checkout are a category-wide trust killer.
compliance_notes: all-in pricing rules (e.g., NY ticket law)

entries.name: Food — Recipe App
entries.tone_guidance: Show prep time and yield before the ingredient list — the cook decides feasibility before they read.

entries.name: Food — Meal Kit Subscription
entries.tone_guidance: Make 'skip a week' as visible as 'add to next box' — hiding pause is what kills LTV in this category.

entries.name: Food — Kitchen Display System
entries.tone_guidance: Sized for greasy-finger taps and oven-glance reading — never a 14px font, never a hover-only state.

entries.name: Travel — Hotel Booking
entries.tone_guidance: Total nightly rate with taxes appears before the headline price — drip pricing destroys conversion.

entries.name: Travel — Airline
entries.tone_guidance: Show delays before promos — never let a marketing banner cover a gate change.

entries.name: Travel — Visa / Immigration Application
entries.tone_guidance: Never use celebratory copy for visa milestones — denial is common; the UI must hold both outcomes.
compliance_notes: data privacy for sensitive identity docs

entries.name: Wellness — Mental Wellness App (consumer)
entries.tone_guidance: Never gamify mental-health streaks aggressively — a missed day cannot read as failure.

entries.name: Logistics — Warehouse Management
entries.tone_guidance: Big tap targets and large fonts — warehouse workers wear gloves and look at the screen for 0.5s.

entries.name: MENA — Islamic Banking
entries.tone_guidance: Never use the word 'interest' in product copy — profit-rate framing is religiously and legally required.

entries.name: MENA — Ramadan / Religious Companion App
entries.tone_guidance: Arabic typography is sacred-adjacent — never stretch, distort, or apply effects to Quranic text.

entries.name: MENA — Loyalty / Rewards Platform
entries.tone_guidance: Phone is the only customer identity — never ask for email anywhere in the consumer flow.

entries.name: Long Tail — Nonprofit / Donation
entries.tone_guidance: Show real outcome data per dollar — guilt-driven asks have lower conversion than evidenced impact.

entries.name: Long Tail — Pet Services / Vet Booking
Long Tail — Funeral / Memorial Services
entries.tone_guidance: Never use upsell language — every microcopy choice reads as exploitation if not calibrated for grief.

entries.name: Long Tail — Childcare / Babysitter Marketplace
entries.tone_guidance: Show background-check status before the first message — trust is the entire product, not a feature.
